revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:特殊器台・特殊壺); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:54, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/76393669 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:54, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:特殊器台・特殊壺 | revid=76393669 --> == 「沈潜文」が間違っていると思います == 「概要」の「通常の器台・壺から特殊器台・特殊壺へ」のところで「沈潜文」という用語が出てきますが、「沈線文」の間違いだと思います。 --[[利用者:太陽太郎|太陽太郎]]（[[利用者‐会話:太陽太郎|会話]]） 2020年2月29日 (土) 01:07 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:54, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:54, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/76393669 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:54, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:特殊器台・特殊壺 | revid=76393669 --> == 「沈潜文」が間違っていると思います == 「概要」の「通常の器台・壺から特殊器台・特殊壺へ」のところで「沈潜文」という用語が出てきますが、「沈線文」の間違いだと思います。 --[[User:太陽太郎|太陽太郎]]（[[利用者‐会話:太陽太郎|会話]]） 2020年2月29日 (土) 01:07 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:54, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Ceremonial_vessel_stands_or_jars here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Ceremonial_vessel_stands_or_jars for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:54, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/76393669 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:54, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:特殊器台・特殊壺 | revid=76393669 --> == 「沈潜文」が間違っていると思います == 「概要」の「通常の器台・壺から特殊器台・特殊壺へ」のところで「沈潜文」という用語が出てきますが、「沈線文」の間違いだと思います。 --[[User:太陽太郎|太陽太郎]]（[[利用者‐会話:太陽太郎|会話]]） 2020年2月29日 (土) 01:07 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:54, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
